mapper.insert: insert into tbl_member_profile_file (id, member_id, profile_image_type) values (#{id}, #{memberId}, 'profile')
insert into tbl_member_profile_file (id, member_id, profile_image_type) values (#{id}, #{memberId}, 'banner')
mapper.select: select f.id, f.original_name, f.file_name, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.content_type, f.created_datetime, mpf.member_id, mpf.profile_image_type from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = #{memberId} and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' order by f.id desc limit 1

select f.id, f.original_name, f.file_name, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.content_type, f.created_datetime, mpf.member_id, mpf.profile_image_type from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = #{memberId} and mpf.profile_image_type = 'banner' order by f.id desc limit 1
